commands.repair_reason: - [P2] There is a narrow, source-backed repair: make the unresolved WhatsApp pre-auth branch honor disabled DM policy and add the missing regression test.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a security-boundary bug where one WhatsApp pre-auth path can expose disabled-DM content to trusted hooks before policy evaluation.; Review finding: [P1] Respect disabled policy before unresolved WhatsApp pre-auth — extensions/... (sha=1ff2eeff7825cd1911aed237827f1aa3f6ea37ef)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds pre-auth message hooks for blocked Telegram and WhatsApp DMs, grouped DM `allowFrom` entries with `/allowlist add dm --group`, auto-loading for trusted access-request hooks, docs, tests, and a workspace hook example.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a WhatsApp DM with an unmapped `remoteJid` reaches `extensions/whatsapp/src/inbound/monitor.ts:636` and emits pre-auth before the disabled-policy check in `checkInboundAccessControl`.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] There is a narrow, source-backed repair: make the unresolved WhatsApp pre-auth branch honor disabled DM policy and add the missing regression test.
